title.en: China-to-Burkina Faso Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入布基纳法索：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入布吉納法索：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Burkina Faso ABNORM conformity requirements, ARSE licensing, SONABEL grid-connection specifications, IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence, IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 62920 EMC, 50 Hz 220/380 V grid settings, off-grid / mini-grid IEC TS 62257 requirements, and donor / lender procurement specifications — versus China GB/T 37408 and GB/T 19964 baselines. High-irradiation Sahel context with elevated ambient temperature (≥45 °C) and dust derating considerations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与布基纳法索ABNORM合格评定要求、ARSE许可、SONABEL并网规格、IEC 62109-1/-2安全证据、IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 62920 EMC、50 Hz 220/380 V电网参数、离网/微电网IEC TS 62257要求及捐助方/贷款方采购规格——对比中国GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964基准的差距对照。包含萨赫勒高辐照背景下的高环境温度（≥45 °C）及粉尘降额注意事项。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與布吉納法索ABNORM合格評定要求、ARSE許可、SONABEL併網規格、IEC 62109-1/-2安全證據、IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 62920 EMC、50 Hz 220/380 V電網參數、離網/微電網IEC TS 62257要求及捐助方/貸款方採購規格——對比中國GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964基準的差距對照。包含薩赫勒高輻照背景下的高環境溫度（≥45 °C）及粉塵降額注意事項。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, ABNORM conformity scope determination, ARSE licensing approval, SONABEL grid-connection approval, ABER/FDE project eligibility decision, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Burkina Faso ABNORM technical regulations, ARSE licensing requirements, SONABEL grid-connection technical specifications, donor/lender procurement standards, and project-owner requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、ABNORM合格评定范围裁定、ARSE许可批准、SONABEL并网批准、ABER/FDE项目资格决定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行布基纳法索ABNORM技术法规、ARSE许可要求、SONABEL并网技术规格、捐助方/贷款方采购标准及项目业主要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、ABNORM合格評定範圍裁定、ARSE許可批准、SONABEL併網批准、ABER/FDE項目資格決定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行布吉納法索ABNORM技術法規、ARSE許可要求、SONABEL併網技術規格、捐助方/貸款方採購標準及項目業主要求。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to Burkina Faso, the key practical gaps are: (1) ABNORM conformity assessment — Burkina Faso adopts IEC standards via ABNORM; Chinese GB/T certificates are not automatically recognised and IEC-referenced type-test evidence is the expected baseline; (2) ARSE licensing — grid-tied PV generation equipment requires ARSE regulatory authorisation as part of project permitting; (3) SONABEL grid-connection — inverters must comply with SONABEL's connection requirements for 50 Hz, 220/380 V grid (aligned with West African standard CEDEAO/ECOWAS grid parameters); (4) IEC 62109-1/-2 safety type-test evidence is required by donor/lender procurement specifications (World Bank, AFD, AfDB) and by IEC 61727 grid-interface requirements; (5) high-temperature and dust derating — Sahel ambient temperatures routinely reach ≥45 °C; inverter datasheets must demonstrate rated performance at elevated temperature and IP protection appropriate for dusty environments; (6) off-grid and mini-grid projects additionally require IEC TS 62257 series compliance where ABER/FDE specifications apply. Chinese GB/T 37408 and GB/T 19964 baselines do not satisfy these Burkina Faso gates and cannot be substituted without supplementary IEC test evidence.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口布基纳法索时，主要实际差距包括：（1）ABNORM合格评定——布基纳法索通过ABNORM采纳IEC标准；中国GB/T证书不自动获承认，IEC参考型式试验证据是预期基准；（2）ARSE许可——并网光伏发电设备须在项目审批过程中取得ARSE监管授权；（3）SONABEL并网——逆变器须符合SONABEL关于50 Hz、220/380 V电网（与西非CEDEAO/ECOWAS电网参数一致）的接入要求；（4）IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式试验证据——捐助方/贷款方采购规格（世界银行、法开署、非开行）及IEC 61727并网接口要求均有此要求；（5）高温及粉尘降额——萨赫勒环境温度通常达到≥45 °C；逆变器数据表须证明在高温下的额定性能及适合多尘环境的IP防护等级；（6）离网及微电网项目在适用ABER/FDE规格时，还须满足IEC TS 62257系列合规要求。中国GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964基准不满足上述布基纳法索门槛，不可在没有补充IEC测试证据的情况下替代。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口布吉納法索時，主要實際差距包括：（1）ABNORM合格評定——布吉納法索通過ABNORM採納IEC標準；中國GB/T證書不自動獲承認，IEC參考型式試驗證據是預期基準；（2）ARSE許可——併網光伏發電設備須在項目審批過程中取得ARSE監管授權；（3）SONABEL併網——逆變器須符合SONABEL關於50 Hz、220/380 V電網（與西非CEDEAO/ECOWAS電網參數一致）的接入要求；（4）IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式試驗證據——捐助方/貸款方採購規格（世界銀行、法開署、非開行）及IEC 61727併網介面要求均有此要求；（5）高溫及粉塵降額——薩赫勒環境溫度通常達到≥45 °C；逆變器數據表須證明在高溫下的額定性能及適合多塵環境的IP防護等級；（6）離網及微電網項目在適用ABER/FDE規格時，還須滿足IEC TS 62257系列合規要求。中國GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964基準不滿足上述布吉納法索門檻，不可在沒有補充IEC測試證據的情況下替代。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
